issues.description: Missing action: 'Set your {Fish-Man} type Leader as active' is not represented. Requires a leader activation action (not currently in standard action types, but effect is incomplete without it).
Action order wrong: FlipLife should be second action, not first. Leader activation must happen before life flip.
Missing condition: 'your {Fish-Man} type Leader' requires condition checking leader type. Should include condition: {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"Fish-Man"}
